mapper.sql: id, parent_id, tree_path, type, name, grade_year, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select class.id, class.grade_year, class.name as className, college.id as collegeId, college.name as collegeName, major.id as majorId, major.name as majorName, class.create_time from edu_unit class left join edu_unit college on find_in_set(college.id, class.tree_path) and college.type = 1 and college.delflag = 0 left join edu_unit major on major.id = class.parent_id and major.type = 2 and college.delflag = 0 where class.type = 3 and class.delflag = 0
and (class.name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or college.name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or major.name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%'))
and find_in_set(#{query.parentId}, class.tree_path)
order by college.create_time, major.create_time, class.grade_year desc, class.create_time
select edu.id, edu.parent_id, edu.name, edu.type as eduType, edu.grade_year from edu_unit edu where edu.id = #{id} and edu.delflag = 0
